feature: MillenniumIT Gap Closure Sprint 3 — Missing → Covered
requirement: Watch lists, trade capture reports, drop copy FIX gateway, IP restrictions, password policy

tasks.title: Watch lists + trade capture reports + IP restrictions + password policy
tasks.description:
Address 4 missing items.

Part A — Watch lists:
APPEND to types.go: WatchList struct (ID, Name, OwnerID, InstrumentIDs []string, ClientIDs []string, FirmIDs []string, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags)
APPEND to store.go: WatchListStore interface (Create, Get, List(ownerID), AddItem(id, instrumentID/clientID/firmID), RemoveItem, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_watchlist.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/watchlists — create {name, instrument_ids?, client_ids?, firm_ids?}
- GET /api/v1/securities/watchlists — list for current user
- GET /api/v1/securities/watchlists/{id}
- PUT /api/v1/securities/watchlists/{id} — update items
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/watchlists/{id}

Part B — Trade capture reports:
Create handlers_trade_capture.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/trade-capture-reports?firm_id=X&date=YYYY-MM-DD — generate per-firm trade report
  - List all trades where buyer_firm or seller_firm matches
  - Return formatted report: {firm_id, date, trades[], total_buy_qty, total_sell_qty, total_buy_value, total_sell_value, net_position}

Part C — IP address restrictions:
APPEND to types.go: IPRestriction struct (ParticipantID, AllowedIPs []string, DenyIPs []string, Enabled bool)
APPEND to store.go: IPRestrictionStore interface (Get(participantID), Set, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_ip_restriction.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/ip-restrictions/{participant_id}
- PUT /api/v1/securities/ip-restrictions/{participant_id} — set {allowed_ips[], deny_ips[], enabled}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/ip-restrictions/{participant_id}

Part D — Password policy:
APPEND to types.go: PasswordPolicy struct (TenantID, MinLength int, RequireUppercase bool, RequireLowercase bool, RequireDigit bool, RequireSpecial bool, MaxAge int (days), HistoryCount int)
APPEND to store.go: PasswordPolicyStore interface (Get(tenantID), Set) + InMemory
Create handlers_password_policy.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/password-policy — get for current tenant
- PUT /api/v1/securities/password-policy — set policy

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for Sprint 3
tasks.description:
Write tests for watch lists, trade capture, IP restrictions, password policy.

1. store_test.go:
- TestWatchListStore_CRUD
- TestWatchListStore_AddRemoveItems
- TestIPRestrictionStore_SetGetDelete
- TestPasswordPolicyStore_SetGet

2. handlers_watchlist_test.go:
- TestCreateWatchList → 201
- TestListWatchLists
- TestUpdateWatchList → 200
- TestDeleteWatchList → 204

3. handlers_trade_capture_test.go:
- TestTradeCaptureReport_ForFirm — trades filtered by firm
- TestTradeCaptureReport_EmptyDate → empty report

4. handlers_ip_restriction_test.go:
- TestSetIPRestriction → 200
- TestGetIPRestriction → 200
- TestDeleteIPRestriction → 204

5. handlers_password_policy_test.go:
- TestSetPasswordPolicy → 200
- TestGetPasswordPolicy → 200

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
